announcements.title: What's new in 2.0.0
announcements.message: Borg UI 2.0.0 adds built-in plans, Borg 2 support, better access control, and a more polished day-to-day experience. New installs include 60 days of full access before Community plan limits apply.

message_localized.es: Borg UI 2.0.0 agrega planes integrados, soporte para Borg 2, mejor control de acceso y una experiencia diaria mas pulida. Las instalaciones nuevas incluyen 60 dias de acceso completo antes de que se apliquen los limites del plan Community.
message_localized.de: Borg UI 2.0.0 bringt integrierte Plane, Borg-2-Unterstutzung, bessere Zugriffskontrollen und ein reiferes Nutzungserlebnis. Neue Installationen enthalten 60 Tage vollen Zugriff, bevor die Grenzen des Community-Plans gelten.
message_localized.it: Borg UI 2.0.0 aggiunge piani integrati, supporto a Borg 2, un controllo degli accessi migliore e un'esperienza d'uso piu rifinita. Le nuove installazioni includono 60 giorni di accesso completo prima che si applichino i limiti del piano Community.

highlights: Built-in Community, Pro, and Enterprise plans, with licensing managed directly in the app
Borg 2 support across repository create, import, stats, and archive flows
A revamped dashboard, cleaner navigation, improved settings, and auto theme mode
RBAC, repository access controls, personal profiles, and API tokens for multi-user setups
Stronger SSH, restore, testing, and CI reliability

es: Planes Community, Pro y Enterprise integrados, con licencias gestionadas directamente en la app
Soporte para Borg 2 en creacion, importacion, estadisticas y archivos
Panel renovado, navegacion mas limpia, mejor configuracion y modo de tema automatico
RBAC, controles de acceso por repositorio, perfiles personales y tokens API para entornos multiusuario
Announcements y mayor visibilidad del sistema
Mayor fiabilidad en SSH, restauracion, pruebas y CI
